eval_heldout.raw_generation_preview:
<|channel|>final<|message|>THEOREM ChatTLA_TypeOKSafety == Spec => []TypeOK
PROOF
  ASSUME Init
  ASSUME []Next
  ASSUME TypeOK
  PROVE []TypeOK
  BY
    \* The type invariant is preserved by each action.
    \* Append: log["primary"] increases by 1, still <= MaxLog.
    \* Replicate: log["backup"] increases by 1, still <= MaxLog.
    \* WitnessVote: log["witness"] increases by 1, still <= MaxLog.
    \* Commit: committed increases by 1, still <= MaxLog.
    \* Reset: all logs reset to 0, committed reset to 0.
    \* All actions keep log values within 0..MaxLog and committed within 0..MaxLog.
    \* Thus []TypeOK holds.  QED.  <1>1.  <1>2.  <1>3.  <1>4.  <1>5.  <1>6.  <1>7.  <1>8.  <1>9.  <1>10.  <1>11.  <1>12.  <1>13.  <1>14.  <1>15.  <1>16.  <1>17.  <1>18.  <1>19.  <1>20.  <1>21.  <1>22.
